summary: TWO_COLUMN additivity for linear maps. Left route 1 builds v+w head-to-tail, transforms that sum to A(v+w), and leaves the result as a grey ghost vector. Route 2 separately transforms v and w into Av and Aw, shifts Aw head-to-tail after Av, and draws the final green Av+Aw vector on top of the grey result. Right: route formulas and A(v+w)=Av+Aw explain why the endpoints coincide.
